At each step, EITHER issue exactly one more natural-language sub-query to gather missing information, OR give the final answer if you already have enough.
Respond with EXACTLY ONE of the following and nothing else:

  <final_answer>your concise final answer</final_answer>

Step 2 sub-query: What is the complete list of three Michelin star restaurants in San Francisco for 2025?
  Tool: google_search
  Result: [{"title": "List of Michelin 3-star restaurants - Wikipedia", "link": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Michelin_3-star_restaurants", "snippet": "Michelin stars are a rating system used by the red Michelin Guide to grade restaurants on their quality. The guide was originally developed in 1900 to show French drivers where local amenities such as restaurants and mechanics were.", "content": "List of Michelin 3-star restaurants - Wikipedia Jump to content From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia Michelin stars are a rating system used by the red Michelin Guide to grade restaurants on their quality. The guide was originally developed in 1900 to show French drivers where local amenities such as restaurants and mechanics were. The rating system was first introduced in 1926 as a single star, with the second and third stars introduced in 1933. [ 1 ] According to the Guide, one star signifies \"a very good restaurant\", two stars are \"excellent cooking that is worth a detour\", and three stars mean \"exceptional cuisine that is worth a special journey\". [ 2 ] The listing of starred restaurants is updated once per year. Summary [ edit ] The 2025 Michelin Guides list 156 restaurants with 
Step 3 sub-query: What are the names of the three Michelin star restaurants in San Francisco in 2025?
  Tool: google_search
  Result: [{"title": "List of Michelin-starred restaurants in California - Wikipedia", "link": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Michelin-starred_restaurants_in_California", "snippet": "Northern California ; Californian-European \u00b7 San Francisco \u2013 Russian Hill \u00b7 1 Michelin star ; Mediterranean \u00b7 San Francisco \u2013 SoMa \u00b7 1 Michelin star ...", "content": "List of Michelin-starred restaurants in California - Wikipedia Jump to content From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia The French Laundry, a 3 Michelin-starred restaurant in Yountville, California As of the 2025 Michelin Guide , there are 87 restaurants in California that hold a Michelin star. [ 1 ] The Michelin Guides have been published by the French tire company Michelin since 1900. They were designed as a guide to tell drivers about eateries they recommended to visit and to subtly sponsor their tires, by encouraging drivers to use their cars more and therefore need to replace the tires as they wore out. Over time, the stars that were given out started to become more valuable. [ 2 ] Multiple anonymous Michelin inspectors visit the restaurants several times. They rate the restaurants on five criteria: \"quality
